# Job Description — Senior Product Manager, Payments

## Company
ZenithPay

## Responsibilities
- Own the roadmap for payment processing products used by mid-market merchants.
- Partner with Engineering and Data to improve onboarding and conversion.
- Define and track success metrics for product launches.
- Build fraud and risk management capabilities.
- Collaborate with Sales and Customer Success to gather feedback.

## Requirements
- 6+ years of product management experience in fintech or payments.
- Experience with API platforms and developer-facing products.
- Strong analytics skills; SQL preferred.
- Proven ability to ship features that reduce fraud or chargebacks.
- Excellent cross-functional leadership and communication.
